This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] iframe referrerpolicy="", origin A
  assert_array_equals: windowClient.ancestorOrigins value is undefined, expected array
[FAIL] iframe referrerpolicy="no-referrer", origin A
  assert_array_equals: windowClient.ancestorOrigins value is undefined, expected array
[FAIL] iframe referrerpolicy="same-origin", origin A
  assert_array_equals: windowClient.ancestorOrigins value is undefined, expected array
[FAIL] iframe referrerpolicy="same-origin", origin B
  assert_array_equals: windowClient.ancestorOrigins value is undefined, expected array
Harness: the test ran to completion.
